name: CloudTunnel
description: An automated infrastructure utility that establishes secure bridges between local Linux environments and public DNS records via the Cloudflare API. Fully automates Playit.gg tunnel lifecycle management.

name: WordFall Engine
description: A high-performance technical case study in reverse-engineering and state machine simulation. Replicates real-time interactive game loops while keeping core state tracking completely decoupled from the rendering layer.

name: Raylib C Workspace
description: A streamlined development template for compiling low-level graphical applications in C. Features automated Makefile systems, native compilation tools, and pre-configured workspace paths.
